text:
{
  "isSuspicious": true,
  "deviation": "The process 'GruntHTTP.exe' is not a well-known Windows binary. It deleted a PowerShell script from a temporary directory, repeatedly modified Internet connection settings in the registry, and loaded multiple DLLs associated with networking, domain services, and Windows Remote Management (WinRM). This combination of activities is highly suspicious for an unknown executable.",
  "indicators": [
    "unknown process",
    "powershell script deletion",
    "registry modification",
    "internet settings modification",
    "network activity",
    "remote management DLLs"
  ]
}
